title: PMS Mini Construction Trucks - 7.62cm (1 Count) - Assorted Colors & Designs - Fun & Durable Toy Vehicles For Kids
features: VIBRANT & FUN DESIGN: Choose from four vibrant colors (red, white, blue, yellow) and four exciting designs (mixer, digger, dumper, crane) to provide endless hours of imaginative and educational play for your child.
HIGH-QUALITY: Made from high-quality materials, our mini construction trucks can withstand tough play, providing countless hours of entertainment for your little ones.
PERFECT SIZE: These 7.62cm mini construction trucks are designed to fit comfortably in a young child's hand, helping them develop fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination.

FUN & EDUCATIONAL: These construction trucks not only entertain but also help develop children's understanding of basic engineering concepts, spatial awareness, and problem-solving abilities. Let your child experience the joy of learning while having fun.
IDEAL GIFT FOR KIDS: Surprise your little builder with these engaging toy vehicles on birthdays, holidays, or any special occasion, as they spark creativity and encourage imaginative play.
description: Discover a world of fun and creativity with our mini construction trucks. Measuring a compact 7.62cm, these toy vehicles make for perfect play companions for your little ones. Each pack contains 1 assorted design, adding an element of surprise to every purchase. Available in a vibrant mix of colors, these trucks aren't just entertaining, they're visually appealing too. Built to last, our durable toy vehicles can withstand hours of imaginative play, providing your children with endless enjoyment. Encourage your child's curiosity and love for construction with these engaging toys. Note: Suitable for children from ages 3 and up.
